  • Uses of WebsocketCloseReason in io.fluxzero.sdk.common.websocket

    Methods in io.fluxzero.sdk.common.websocket with parameters of type WebsocketCloseReason
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    WebsocketSession.abort(WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
    Immediately aborts the underlying transport and reports the given close reason to the endpoint.
    void
    WebsocketSession.close(WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
    Closes the session with a specific close reason.
    protected void
    AbstractWebsocketClient.handleClose(WebsocketSession session, WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
     
    void
    AbstractWebsocketClient.onClose(WebsocketSession session, WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
     
    void
    WebsocketEndpoint.onClose(WebsocketSession session, WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
    Called once when a session closes or is aborted.

  • Uses of WebsocketCloseReason in io.fluxzero.testserver.websocket

    Methods in io.fluxzero.testserver.websocket with parameters of type WebsocketCloseReason
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerWebsocketSession.abort(WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
    Terminates the connection without waiting for a close handshake.
    void
    ServerWebsocketSession.close(WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
    Closes the session with the provided WebSocket close code and reason.
    void
    ConsumerEndpoint.onClose(ServerWebsocketSession session, WebsocketCloseReason closeReason)
